questions.question: The meeting {a1} because of the storm.
In passive phrasal verbs, the particle usually {a1}.
The children {a1} by their aunt.
The trip {a1} until Friday.
She {a1} by her grandparents.
His request {a1} politely.
The complaint {a1} quickly.
Active: “They called off the match.” Passive: “The match {a1}.”
The correct order is “The plan was carried {a1},” not “carried.”
Do not drop the particle: write “The baby was looked {a1}.”
The issue {a1} at the next meeting.
In “The offer was turned down,” “down” is the {a1}.
